caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt and a green baseball cap with headphones sits in a room decorated with numerous framed photos on the wall. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a clothing store environment is visible, featuring a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and racks of apparel. On-screen logos include a circular emblem with the text "BOSSY" and a red and white logo that reads "BOSSY TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man's expression shifts; he begins by looking thoughtful with his hand to his chin, then turns his head away from the camera, and eventually looks back toward the interlocutor with a smile. The text on his shirt is partially legible as "ION NEVER DO SUIT AT WORK". Another person in a white t-shirt briefly appears in the far right background.
